title: GANG PREVENTION AND INTERVENTION - 211info
text: IRCO PACIFIC ISLANDER AND ASIAN FAMILY CENTER GANG PREVENTION AND INTERVENTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Outreach, connection to support services, and case management for youth at risk of gang involvement. Academic support and skill building, adult or peer mentoring, and family engagement activities also provided. 8040 NE Sandy Boulevard Suite 200 Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Youth at risk of gang involvement Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (971) 271-6586 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 235-9396 Main phone Program phone (971) 271-6586 Marcus Waughfield [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement. IRCO has language resources available to ensure that clients can speak with someone in their own language for all programs. AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 12 and 72 Services: Gang Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH ACADEMIC SUPPORT AND PARENT ENGAGEMENT HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTH NAVIGATION HOUSING/SHELTER - EMERGENCY RENTAL ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE FOR FAMILIES WITH CHILDREN INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ASIAN AND PACIFIC ISLANDER DEVELOPMENT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILDREN'S PROGRAMS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SERVICES AGAINST EXPLOITATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH MENTORING MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - FAMILY PROGRAMS UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
